text.title: Requirement Quality Scorecard Core Rules
text.summary: 9 testable rules with rationale + source for requirement-quality-scorecard. Includes terminal skip-this-methodology rule.

rule.statement: Each requirement MUST be scored on 6 axes: atomicity, testability, traceability, value, ambiguity (inverse), completeness — each 0/1/2.
rule.rationale: BABOK v3 requirement-quality attributes — applies to Requirement Quality Scorecard.

rule.statement: Atomicity=2 if requirement covers one verifiable behaviour; 1 if it covers a tightly grouped pair; 0 if it carries multiple behaviours that must be split.
rule.rationale: INCOSE requirements-writing guide — applies to Requirement Quality Scorecard.

rule.statement: Testability=2 if a test case can be written without ambiguity; 1 if a test exists but needs interpretation; 0 if no test is derivable.
rule.rationale: INCOSE + ISO/IEC/IEEE 29148 — applies to Requirement Quality Scorecard.

rule.statement: Traceability=2 if forward + backward links exist (to need + to design / test); 1 if only one direction; 0 if absent.
rule.rationale: Traceability research — applies to Requirement Quality Scorecard.

rule.statement: Ambiguity is scored inverse: 2 = no ambiguous terms; 1 = 1-2 weak words (may, should); 0 = 3+ weak words or undefined glossary terms.
rule.rationale: Ambiguity-detection research — applies to Requirement Quality Scorecard.

rule.statement: Baseline requires aggregate score at least 10 / 12; below that, requirement returns to drafting with annotated weaknesses.
rule.rationale: Quality-gate practice — applies to Requirement Quality Scorecard.

rule.statement: Each axis score MUST cite evidence (test case id, glossary entry, parent epic); un-evidenced scores forbidden.
rule.rationale: Audit-trail discipline — applies to Requirement Quality Scorecard.

rule.statement: Reviewer named per axis when scores diverge; anonymous scoring forbidden.
rule.rationale: Single-owner accountability — applies to Requirement Quality Scorecard.

rule.statement: If the engagement has fewer than 20 requirements or no baseline event, return `skipped`.
rule.rationale: Methodology applicability — applies to Requirement Quality Scorecard.
